heading: Settings
subtitle: Your account profile. Inquiries, listings and payments will use these details on contracts and admin records.

photoSection.title: Profile photo
photoSection.body: Shown in messages and on your account. Google sign-in imports your Google photo automatically.

kycSection.title: KYC verification
kycSection.body: Verify your phone (Level 1) and upload ID or company documents for Level 2. Level 3 is assigned by admin for trusted sellers. Gates may require higher levels when enabled in admin settings.

languageSection.title: Language
languageSection.body: Choose the UI language. Legal documents (contracts) and email notifications remain in English regardless of this setting.
languageSection.label: Display language
